series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, posts made or approved by the Ohio Casino Control Commission (OCCC) on its public website and/or social media sites such as Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Linkedin, etc., that are made to market the agency and share information that is of interest to the citizens of Ohio and its staff. This information can include but is not to be limited to: press releases, photos, videos, events, meeting minutes, orders and decisions, announcements, frequently asked questions, annual reports, meeting schedules, and general information about OCCC and the services it provides. Social media systems or platforms are maintained by the owners of the systems or platforms and not OCCC.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: updated or no longer of administrative value
